meta.title: Planning
meta.description: A free overview of what's at stake — inheritance, wills, cross-border, and more — then go deeper at your own pace. Informational guidance, never a replacement for your professional.

hero.heading: Be ready, before life forces it.
hero.intro: Start with a free overview of what's at stake. Go deeper when you're ready, at your own pace — and share a clean summary with the professional handling it. Guidance is informational; it doesn't replace your solicitor or advisor.

areas.title: Will planning
areas.tagline: Understand what a will should cover and where the gaps are, before you sit down with a solicitor.

areas.title: Inheritance
areas.tagline: See what passing things on could involve for your family — calmly, and at your own pace.

areas.title: Financial overview
areas.tagline: A clear read on your whole picture: what you own, what it means, and what to look at next.

areas.title: Cross-border
areas.tagline: Assets or family in more than one country? Understand the considerations that come with it.

areas.title: Prenup
areas.tagline: Think through protecting what matters to each of you, with clarity and no pressure.

areas.title: Divorce & separation
areas.tagline: A quiet, practical starting point for understanding assets when things are changing.

areaCta: Free overview → Plan when you're ready
